purpose: Replay the supplied on-device failure screenshots against the production real-photo open/no-cap bottle database and document the runtime failure cause.

common_settings.pose: independent strict/guided candidate solving with SQPnP, EPNP and iterative RANSAC followed by LM refinement

root_cause: The r7 phone runtime selected the coarse-pose-guided match set whenever it contained eight records. A bad initial mesh projection could therefore replace a valid strict real-photo set and send many false correspondences into a single iterative pose attempt. This explains failures such as 0/53 and 20/63 despite the same screenshots having valid strict solutions offline.
fix: r8 solves strict real-photo and guided match sets independently, tries multiple robust pose solvers, refines each candidate, and selects using pose inliers, spatial coverage and reprojection error. The coarse B pose is a hint only and cannot suppress a valid global match set.
scope_boundary: Offline screenshot replay confirms feature and pose solvability. It does not prove continuous real-device AR tracking or physical B-to-A overlay.
